missions.name: Saturn Ring Ice Hedge
missions.description: Vance wants pristine Saturn ring ice booked against the Society's coolant futures before the next maintenance vote.

missions.name: Martian Methane Position
missions.description: The Jovian Society's refinery book needs Martian methane as catalyst stock. Vance pays cleanly if the shipment clears before repricing.

missions.name: Boardroom Resupply
missions.description: Earth-side concessions owe the Society a sealed supply crate. Vance wants it routed through Jupiter before any smaller creditors notice.
